creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #3)
Hi,

Unfortunately I cannot test with 11.0-RELEASE because world no longer builds cleanly with lang/gcc5 or lang/gcc6 as XCC (world/kernel will compile but world's /usr/bin/cc segfaults) and testing a GCC XCC with 10.3-RELEASE is very fragile, I've never gotten a clean build of 10.3-RELEASE world with XCC ever (/bin/sh segfaults).

For now I just build WITHOUT_CDDL as a workaround this PR213588 because I don't use dtrace or zfs anyway.
